title: Yang-Mills Implications of Hodge Proof

analysis.object: T793: Yang-Mills Implications of Hodge Proof depth analysis

duy_theorem.description: Donaldson-Uhlenbeck-Yau: stable holomorphic bundle <-> irreducible Hermitian-Yang-Mills connection
duy_theorem.reason: The bridge: algebraic geometry <-> gauge theory

hodge_and_bundles.description: Hodge conjecture on moduli of bundles: algebraic cycles = gauge field configurations

hodge_on_moduli.description: T790 applies to moduli spaces of bundles (smooth projective -- DUY applies)

yang_mills_measure.description: YM mass gap requires constructing the Yang-Mills measure (functional integral)

hodge_and_ym_measure.description: Algebraic cycles on moduli (from Hodge) = measure-0 set in YM path integral?

partial_progress.description: Hodge gives algebraic geometry of YM solutions. Measure construction still EML-inf.
partial_progress.reason: Hodge helps but doesn't close YM

t793_result.description: T793: Hodge + DUY gives algebraic description of all Yang-Mills solutions. Measure construction remains EML-inf. Hodge moves YM from 'no tools' to 'one hard sub-problem'. T793.
t793_result.reason: YM advances but remains open -- measure is the barrier

analysis.theorem: T793: Yang-Mills Implications of Hodge Proof (S1072).

key_theorem: T793: Yang-Mills Implications of Hodge Proof (S1072).
